---
title: "Supplementary Material — Index"
subtitle: "Spectral Effects of Heavy-Tailed Vertex Noise in Geometric Graphs"
author:
  - Ben Cardoen, Jeremy Budd, Enrico Amico, Ghassan Hamarneh, Fabian Spill
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    papersize: letter
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
---

This document indexes the supplementary material accompanying the paper
*Spectral Effects of Heavy-Tailed Vertex Noise in Geometric Graphs*.

## Contents of the Appendix

| Section | Title | Page |
|:--------|:------|-----:|
| 5.1 | Notation reference | 1 |
| 5.2 | Algorithms and reproduction | 1 |
| 5.3 | Algorithm 1 — Sample from CTPL distribution | 2 |
| 5.4 | Algorithm 2 — Autotune $\lambda$ for tail probability | 2 |
| 5.5 | Algorithm 3 — Estimate tail probability by Monte Carlo | 3 |
| 5.6 | Algorithm 4 — Perturb 2D vertex by CTPL noise | 3 |
| 5.7 | Algorithm 5 — Motif-Extractor | 3 |
| 5.8 | Algorithm 6 — $\varepsilon$-Thickness Repair | 3 |
| 5.9 | Proof that optimal motif tiling is NP-hard | 3 |

\medskip

**Source repositories** (see Section 5.2 for details):

- `DynamicGeometricGraphs.jl` — geometric graph constructions, repair, motif detection
- `CalibratedTemperedPowerLaw.jl` — CTPL distribution, sampling, S3I/SC metrics
- `GeometricVertexNoiseSpectra` — reproduction scripts for all figures and experiments
